a6_r3_acceptance_criteria: explicit paper/sandbox backend seam exists and is discoverable
execution real-live-forbidden guard exists and is discoverable
with no paper backend active, route returns fail-closed before broker call

forbidden_behavior: No fallback to Dhan real execution.
No fallback to Zerodha real execution.
No silent conversion from sandbox to real broker.
minimal_patch_targets_for_a6_r3_if_appro.planned_change_type: add explicit controlled-paper sandbox backend seam
required_behavior: Never call Zerodha or Dhan real-live order APIs.
Return fail-closed result when paper/sandbox backend is absent.
Include order_sent=false unless a verified paper/sandbox backend is explicitly active.

forbidden_behavior: No auto strategy switching into execution.
minimal_patch_targets_for_a6_r3_if_appro.planned_change_type: add hard controlled-paper real-live-forbidden guard before any order route
required_behavior: Fail closed if SCALPX_REAL_LIVE_ALLOWED or SCALPX_ALLOW_REAL_LIVE is set.
Fail closed if SCALPX_ALLOW_BROKER_ORDERS is set without explicit paper/sandbox route.
Fail closed if position is not flat before entry.
Fail closed if scope is not exactly one approved family/side.
Fail closed if qty exceeds 1 lot.
Fail closed if paper/sandbox backend is not discoverable.
Exits/flatten safety paths must remain allowed and must not be blocked by entry veto.

forbidden_behavior: No broker call in route selection.
No Redis trading-stream write in dry-run mode.
No live service start from patch helpers.
minimal_patch_targets_for_a6_r3_if_appro.planned_change_type: wire one-active-scope coordinator to execution preflight only
required_behavior: Monitor all five strategies as candidates.
Select exactly one approved scoped signal.
If no valid signal, return NO_TRADE.
If backend or guard is missing, return fail-closed route status.

non_patch_targets.reason: A6-R1 already confirmed controlled-paper risk surfaces; keep as audit-only unless A6-R3 source inspection proves missing veto integration.
Do not add names unless A6-R3 needs a new canonical paper/sandbox route status key. Prefer local constants first if no stream/key contract changes are required.
